task_completion.description: Create an overview page titled 'The Electromagnetic Spectrum' with a brief description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page containing the title 'The Electromagnetic Spectrum' and a text box with a brief description of the spectrum.

task_completion.description: Create a full spectrum diagram page with seven labeled bands and wavelength direction indicators.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page showing seven distinct bands (likely shapes/rectangles) labeled Radio, Microwave, Infrared, Visible, Ultraviolet, X-ray, and Gamma, along with arrows or text indicating the direction of increasing or decreasing wavelength.

task_completion.description: Create a visible light detail page showing the color spectrum and its wavelength range.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page displaying the colors of the visible spectrum (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, Indigo, Violet) and text indicating the wavelength range (e.g., 380 nm - 700 nm).

task_completion.description: Create an applications page listing real-world uses for at least four bands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flipchart page listing at least four of the EM bands along with their real-world applications (e.g., radio for communication, microwaves for cooking, X-rays for medical imaging).

task_completion.description: Save the completed flipchart to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire window title bar shows 'em_spectrum_reference.flipchart', or a save dialog/file manager shows the file saved in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ActivInspire application interface being used to add text, shapes, and pages, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the flipchart file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands that directly write to or generate the .flipchart file.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the pages and content rather than pasting a single pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of multiple pages in the ActivInspire page browser and individual text boxes/shapes being manipulated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The flipchart must contain exactly 4 pages. Page 1: Title 'The Electromagnetic Spectrum' and description. Page 2: 7 bands labeled Radio, Microwave, Infrared, Visible, Ultraviolet, X-ray, Gamma, with wavelength direction indicators. Page 3: Visible light colors (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, Indigo, Violet) and wavelength range (e.g., 380-700 nm). Page 4: Real-world applications for at least 4 bands (e.g., communication, cooking, medical imaging, sterilization). The file must be saved as 'em_spectrum_reference.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts'.
